summary: A fourslash unit test failed because the code-fix title text did not match the test's expectation.

evidence.reason: Shows that at least one test failed in the test run.
Identifies the exact test file that failed.

evidence.quote: AssertionError: expected 'Add return type \'Foo<string>\'' to equal 'Add return type \'Foo<string, string[…'
evidence.reason: The assertion error shows the test expected a different code-fix title string than what was produced.

suggested_fix: Compare the actual code-fix title produced by the test run to the test's expected string and either (a) update the expected string in tests/cases/fourslash/codeFixMissingTypeAnnotationOnExports52-generics-oversimplification.ts to match the current output, or (b) change the code-fix generation so it produces the previously expected title.
